Dialog.name: MSG_Strong_01_Mituru_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}It's in a league of its own, far different from the run-of-the-mill Shadows in this area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}This will be a tough fight. If you're not feeling confident, then don't engage in combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Strong_01_Mituru_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}Should we enter battle, retreat is a viable option.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}We need a leader capable of making level-headed decisions so we don't end up in dire straits.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Strong_01_Fuka
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}I'm sensing an enemy nearby, but, um...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Strong_01_Fuka_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}This Shadow seems a bit tougher than the other ones in this area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}It'll be a tough fight, so if you think you can't handle it, try to avoid combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Strong_01_Fuka_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If you do get caught, it'd be wise to retreat immediately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}And, most importantly, please don't make any reckless decisions. We need you to keep a calm head.[n]{f 1 1}
